name: Celigo Integration Platform API
what_it_does: Celigo Integration Platform as a Service (iPaaS) REST API for managing integrations, flows, and connections between business systems. Enables AI agents to query integration run history, retrieve error logs, manage flow configurations, trigger manual runs, and monitor integration health. Celigo specializes in Salesforce and NetSuite integrations for ecommerce and B2B businesses.
use_cases: Querying integration flow run status and error logs from DataOps monitoring agents
Triggering manual integration runs from business workflow orchestration agents
Retrieving integration error patterns and failed record data from data quality agents
Managing connection credentials and flow configurations from platform ops agents
not_for: Simple webhook or API-to-API integrations (use Zapier or n8n for simple cases)
Real-time data streaming (Celigo is batch/scheduled integration focused)
best_when: A business operations team using Celigo to integrate Salesforce, NetSuite, and ecommerce platforms wants AI agents to monitor integration health, diagnose failures, and manage flows programmatically.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Integration errors can cause data sync failures between financial systems. Automated flow modifications require careful testing before production deployment.

auth.notes: Celigo Bearer token authentication. Tokens generated in Celigo account settings. Account-scoped access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; Celigo requires subscription
pricing.notes: iPaaS pricing based on number of integrations and transactions. Enterprise pricing negotiated.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits not publicly documented; contact Celigo support

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Integration errors can cascade to financial system data (NetSuite, ERP)
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
API documentation is limited — Celigo is more UI-focused than API-first
Flow modifications should always be tested in sandbox before production
Rate limits undocumented — throttle for bulk flow or run history queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Integration platform connects to financial systems (NetSuite, Salesforce). SOC2, GDPR. Bearer token auth. Production flow changes require testing.

security_score_components.security_notes: iPaaS with access to financial and business system data. SOC2, GDPR. Bearer token auth.
